local LOGIN_STATUS_BASE = "Quá trình login gg đang thực hiện "

function showLoginStatus(force)
 local now = os.time()

  login_status_last_at = now
  login_status_dots = login_status_dots + 1
  if login_status_dots > 7 then login_status_dots = 1 end
  sys.toast(LOGIN_STATUS_BASE .. string.rep(".", login_status_dots), 0)

function handleNotNow()

  phase("Tạm dừng bấm notnow")

function waitPhase(ms)
 local remain = ms
 local lastShown = -1
 while remain > 0 do
  handleNotNow()
  local sec = math.ceil(remain / 1000)
  if sec ~= lastShown then
   phaseProgress(sec)
   lastShown = sec
  end
  local step = 500
  if remain < step then step = remain end
  sleep(step)
  remain = remain - step
 end
end

function runActiveXXTE()
 phase("Active XXTE")

 local function find_cookie()
  local bases = {
   "/private/var/mobile/Containers/Shared/AppGroup",
   "/var/mobile/Containers/Shared/AppGroup"
  }

  local paths = {
   "File Provider Storage/Downloads",
   "Downloads",
   "Documents/Downloads"
  }

  for _, base in ipairs(bases) do
   local groups = file.list(base)

   if type(groups) == "table" then
    for _, folder in pairs(groups) do
     for _, p in ipairs(paths) do
      local src = base .. "/" .. folder .. "/" .. p .. "/Cookies.binarycookies"
      if file.exists(src) then
       return src
      end
     end
    end
   end
  end

  return nil
 end

 local safariPath = app.data_path("com.apple.mobilesafari")
 local cookiePath = safariPath .. "/Library/Cookies/Cookies.binarycookies"
 local backupPath = safariPath .. "/Library/Cookies/Cookies_backup.binarycookies"

 -- backup file cũ
 if file.exists(cookiePath) then
  local old = file.reads(cookiePath)
  if old then
   file.writes(backupPath, old)
  end
 end

 -- load cookie mới
 local src = find_cookie()
 if src then
  local data = file.reads(src)
  if data then
   file.writes(cookiePath, data)
  end
 end

 sys.toast("Load cookies xong", 0)
 waitPhase(5000)
 return true
end

function readInputParts()
 local data = file.reads(INPUT_PATH)
 if type(data) ~= "string" then
  return nil, nil, "Không đọc được input.txt"
 end
 data = string.gsub(data, "\r", "")
 local line = string.match(data, "([^\n]+)")
 if not line or line == "" then
  return nil, nil, "input.txt rỗng"
 end
 local left, right = string.match(line, "^(.-)|(.*)$")
 if not left then
  return nil, nil, "input.txt thiếu dấu |"
 end
 return left, right, nil
end

local sys = require("sys")
local app = require("app")

local socket_http = require("socket.http")
local ltn12 = require("ltn12")

local SCRIPT_VERSION = "TT_TL_CLEAR_UNINSTALL_REBOOT_V2"

local APPS = {
 { name = "TikTok Lite", bid = "com.ss.iphone.ugc.tiktok.lite" },
 { name = "TikTok", bid = "com.ss.iphone.ugc.Ame" },
}

local dotCount = 0

local function log(s)
 sys.log("[" .. SCRIPT_VERSION .. "] " .. tostring(s))
end

local function status()
 dotCount = dotCount + 1
 if dotCount > 7 then
  dotCount = 1
 end

 local dots = string.rep(".", dotCount)
 local msg = "Quá trình làm sạch dữ liệu đang tiến hành " .. dots

 sys.toast(msg, 0)
 log(msg)
end

local function sleep(ms)
 local elapsed = 0
 local step = 700

 while elapsed < ms do
  status()

  local wait = step
  if elapsed + wait > ms then
   wait = ms - elapsed
  end

  sys.msleep(wait)
  elapsed = elapsed + wait
 end
end

local function post(url, body, ctype)
 local resp = {}
 body = body or ""

 local ok, code = socket_http.request{
  url = url,
  method = "POST",
  headers = {
   ["Content-Type"] = ctype or "application/json; charset=utf-8",
   ["Content-Length"] = tostring(#body)
  },
  source = ltn12.source.string(body),
  sink = ltn12.sink.table(resp)
 }

 return tostring(code), table.concat(resp), ok
end

local function runStep(appName, name, fn)
 status()

 local ok, ret = pcall(fn)

 if ok then
  log(appName .. " | " .. name .. " OK: " .. tostring(ret))
  sleep(900)
  return true
 else
  log(appName .. " | " .. name .. " ERR: " .. tostring(ret))
  sleep(1200)
  return false
 end
end

local function setupStartup()
 status()

 local c1, r1 = post(
  "http://127.0.0.1:46952/set_startup_run_on",
  "",
  "application/x-www-form-urlencoded"
 )

 sleep(700)

 local c2, r2 = post(
  "http://127.0.0.1:46952/select_startup_script_file",
  '{"filename":"autorun.lua"}',
  "application/json; charset=utf-8"
 )

 sleep(700)

 local c3, r3 = post(
  "http://127.0.0.1:46952/get_startup_conf",
  "{}",
  "application/json; charset=utf-8"
 )

 log("startup set_startup_run_on=" .. tostring(c1) .. " " .. tostring(r1))
 log("startup select_startup_script_file=" .. tostring(c2) .. " " .. tostring(r2))
 log("startup get_startup_conf=" .. tostring(c3) .. " " .. tostring(r3))

 sleep(700)
end

local function clearOne(appInfo)
 local appName = appInfo.name
 local bid = appInfo.bid

 status()

 pcall(function()
  app.quit(bid)
 end)

 sleep(1500)

 runStep(appName, "clear.keychain", function()
  return clear.keychain(bid)
 end)

 runStep(appName, "clear.pasteboard", function()
  return clear.pasteboard()
 end)

 runStep(appName, "clear.cookies", function()
  return clear.cookies(bid)
 end)

 runStep(appName, "clear.caches", function()
  return clear.caches(bid)
 end)

 runStep(appName, "clear.app_data", function()
  return clear.app_data(bid)
 end)

 runStep(appName, "clear.idfav", function()
  return clear.idfav()
 end)

 sleep(1000)
end

local function uninstallApps()
 for _, appInfo in ipairs(APPS) do
  status()

  local appName = appInfo.name
  local bid = appInfo.bid

  log("uninstall " .. appName .. " " .. bid)

  local ok, ret = pcall(function()
   return app.uninstall(bid)
  end)

  log("uninstall " .. appName .. " ok=" .. tostring(ok) .. " ret=" .. tostring(ret))

  sleep(2000)
 end
end

local function rebootDevice()
 sleep(5000)

 status()

 local c, r = post(
  "http://127.0.0.1:46952/reboot2",
  "{}",
  "application/json; charset=utf-8"
 )

 log("reboot2=" .. tostring(c) .. " " .. tostring(r))

 sleep(2000)
end

status()

setupStartup()

for _, appInfo in ipairs(APPS) do
 clearOne(appInfo)
end

uninstallApps()

rebootDevice()

return true

local lines = {}

local function add(s)
  lines[#lines + 1] = tostring(s or "")
end

local function exists(p)
  local f = io.open(p, "rb")
  if f then
    local len = f:seek("end") or -1
    f:close()
    return true, len
  end
  return false, -1
end

local ok_file, file = pcall(require, "file")
local ok_lfs, lfs = pcall(require, "lfs")

local function dirname(p)
  return tostring(p):match("^(.+)/[^/]+$")
end

local function mkdirp(p)
  if not p or p == "" then return end
  local cur = ""
  for part in tostring(p):gmatch("[^/]+") do
    cur = cur .. "/" .. part
    pcall(function()
      if ok_lfs and lfs and lfs.mkdir then lfs.mkdir(cur) end
    end)
    pcall(function()
      if ok_file and file and file.mkdir then file.mkdir(cur) end
    end)
  end
end

local function list(p)
  if ok_file and file and file.list then
    local ok, t = pcall(file.list, p)
    if ok and type(t) == "table" then
      return t
    end
  end
  return {}
end

local function sh(cmd)
  add("$ " .. cmd)
  local f = io.popen(cmd .. " 2>&1")
  local o = ""
  if f then
    o = f:read("*a") or ""
    local ok, why, code = f:close()
    o = o .. "\nCLOSE " .. tostring(ok) .. " " .. tostring(why) .. " " .. tostring(code)
  end
  add(o)
  return o
end

local function shell_quote(s)
  return "'" .. tostring(s):gsub("'", "'\\''") .. "'"
end

local function download_with_lua_socket(url, dst)
  local ok_http, http = pcall(require, "socket.http")
  local ok_ltn12, ltn12 = pcall(require, "ltn12")
  if not ok_http or not http or not ok_ltn12 or not ltn12 then
    add("Lua socket.http/ltn12 missing")
    return false
  end

  local f, err = io.open(dst, "wb")
  if not f then
    add("Lua download open dst fail: " .. tostring(err))
    return false
  end

  local ok, code, headers, status = http.request({
    url = url,
    sink = ltn12.sink.file(f),
    redirect = true,
  })
  add("Lua http.request ok=" .. tostring(ok) .. " code=" .. tostring(code) .. " status=" .. tostring(status))

  local ex, len = exists(dst)
  return ex and len and len > 1024 * 1024
end

local function download_ipa(item)
  mkdirp(dirname(item.ipa))

  local ok, len = exists(item.ipa)
  if ok and len > 1024 * 1024 then
    add(item.name .. " IPA already exists len=" .. tostring(len))
    return true
  end

  pcall(os.remove, item.ipa)
  pcall(function()
    if ok_file and file and file.delete then file.delete(item.ipa) end
  end)

  sh("/usr/bin/curl -L --fail --connect-timeout 20 --max-time 300 -o " .. shell_quote(item.ipa) .. " " .. shell_quote(item.url))
  ok, len = exists(item.ipa)
  if ok and len > 1024 * 1024 then return true end

  sh("/var/jb/usr/bin/curl -L --fail --connect-timeout 20 --max-time 300 -o " .. shell_quote(item.ipa) .. " " .. shell_quote(item.url))
  ok, len = exists(item.ipa)
  if ok and len > 1024 * 1024 then return true end

  sh("/usr/bin/wget -O " .. shell_quote(item.ipa) .. " " .. shell_quote(item.url))
  ok, len = exists(item.ipa)
  if ok and len > 1024 * 1024 then return true end

  sh("/var/jb/usr/bin/wget -O " .. shell_quote(item.ipa) .. " " .. shell_quote(item.url))
  ok, len = exists(item.ipa)
  if ok and len > 1024 * 1024 then return true end

  if download_with_lua_socket(item.url, item.ipa) then return true end

  ok, len = exists(item.ipa)
  add(item.name .. " DOWNLOAD_FAIL exists=" .. tostring(ok) .. " len=" .. tostring(len))
  return false
end

local function find_trollstore()
  for _, root in ipairs(roots) do
    for _, uuid in ipairs(list(root)) do
      local dir = root .. "/" .. tostring(uuid)
      for _, name in ipairs(list(dir)) do
        local appname = tostring(name)
        local apppath = dir .. "/" .. appname
        if appname == "TrollStore.app" then
          local helper = apppath .. "/trollstorehelper"
          local ok = exists(helper)
          if ok then return apppath, helper end
        end
      end
    end
  end
  return nil, nil
end

local function name_match(appname, item)
  if appname == item.app_name then return true end
  if type(item.app_names) == "table" then
    for _, n in ipairs(item.app_names) do
      if appname == n then return true end
    end
  end
  return false
end

local function find_app(item)
  local found = nil
  local count = 0
  for _, root in ipairs(roots) do
    for _, uuid in ipairs(list(root)) do
      local dir = root .. "/" .. tostring(uuid)
      for _, name in ipairs(list(dir)) do
        local appname = tostring(name)
        if name_match(appname, item) then
          count = count + 1
          found = dir .. "/" .. appname
          add("FOUND " .. item.name .. " " .. found)
        end
      end
    end
  end
  return found, count
end

local ok_sys, sys = pcall(require, "sys")

local ts, helper = find_trollstore()
add("TROLLSTORE=" .. tostring(ts))

if not helper then

    local dl_ok = download_ipa(item)

    add("DOWNLOAD_OK=" .. tostring(dl_ok))
    add("IPA exists=" .. tostring(ipa_ok) .. " len=" .. tostring(ipa_len))

    if not ipa_ok or ipa_len <= 1024 * 1024 then
      add(item.name .. " ERROR: IPA download missing/too small")
    else
      sh(shell_quote(helper) .. " install " .. shell_quote(item.ipa))
    end
  end

  sh(shell_quote(helper) .. " refresh")
end

local installed_count = 0

for _, item in ipairs(APPS) do

  if count > 0 then installed_count = installed_count + 1 end

  local opened = false

    if item.bundle and app.open then

      add("app.open " .. tostring(item.bundle) .. " ok=" .. tostring(ok) .. " err=" .. tostring(err))
      opened = opened or ok

  if item.open_url then

    sh("/bin/launchctl asuser 501 /var/jb/usr/bin/uiopen " .. shell_quote(item.open_url))

-- OpenClaw/PYW status sync: write readable status for GUI polling even when run directly on client.
local OC_STATUS_PATH = rawget(_G, "OC_STATUS_PATH") or "/var/mobile/Media/1ferver/lua/examples/oc_status.txt"
function oc_status(text)
    text = tostring(text or "")
    if type(__oc_write_status) == "function" then pcall(__oc_write_status, text) end
    pcall(function()
        local line = tostring(os.time()) .. "|" .. text
        local wrote = false
        local ok_file, file = pcall(require, "file")
        if ok_file and file then
            if type(file.writes) == "function" then local ok = pcall(file.writes, OC_STATUS_PATH, line); wrote = ok or wrote end
            if (not wrote) and type(file.write) == "function" then local ok = pcall(file.write, OC_STATUS_PATH, line); wrote = ok or wrote end
        end
        if not wrote then
            local f = io.open(OC_STATUS_PATH, "w")
            if f then f:write(line) f:close() end
        end
    end)
end
function oc_toast(text, ...)
    text = tostring(text or "")
    oc_status(text)
    if sys and type(sys.toast) == "function" then return sys.toast(text, ...) end
end

   if checkTimeout() then return false end
   local elapsed = os.time() - start
   patrolPopupDuringEvent()
   if elapsed >= nextSwipeAt then
    status("Chua thay event, vuot len")
    touch.down(1, 360, 1050)
    sys.msleep(20)
    touch.move(1, 360, 860)
    sys.msleep(20)
    touch.up(1)
    nextSwipeAt = nextSwipeAt + 20
    sys.msleep(500)
   end
   if tapEventFast() then
    sys.msleep(3000)
    if waitWhiteScreenDisappear(60) then
     return true
    end
    break
   end
   sys.msleep(80)
  end

  status("Event loi, dong TikTok va thu lai")
  pcall(app.quit, TIKTOK_BID)

 ok, x, y = findImage(CHECK_IMG_3, 85, 0, 120, 750, 1230)
 if ok then return true, x, y, 3 end
 return false, -1, -1, 0
end

local function isCheckInGoodZone(y)
 return y >= GOOD_Y_MIN and y <= GOOD_Y_MAX
end

local function adjustCheckToBetterPosition(x, y)
 if not x or not y or x < 0 or y < 0 then
  local ok
  ok, x, y = findCheckByAnyImage()
  if not ok then
   return false, -1, -1
  end
 end

 if isCheckInGoodZone(y) then
  status("Khung claim video dang o vi tri dep, khong can keo")
  return true, x, y
 end

 local holdX = x + 18
 local holdY = y + 18
 local endY = TARGET_Y
 local direction = "up"

 if y < GOOD_Y_MIN then
  direction = "down"
  endY = TARGET_Y + 40
 elseif y > GOOD_Y_MAX then
  direction = "up"
  endY = TARGET_Y
 else
  return true, x, y
 end

 local distance = math.abs(holdY - endY)
 if distance < 80 then
  return true, x, y
 end

 if distance > 220 then
  if direction == "up" then
   endY = holdY - 220
  else
   endY = holdY + 220
  end
 end

 if endY < 260 then endY = 260 end
 if endY > 980 then endY = 980 end

 status("Dang giu va keo khung claim video ve vung giua")
 touch.down(1, holdX, holdY)
 sys.msleep(140)

 local currentY = holdY
 local step = 18
 while math.abs(currentY - endY) > step do
  if checkTimeout() then
   touch.up(1)
   return false, -1, -1
  end
  if direction == "up" then
   currentY = currentY - step
   if currentY < endY then currentY = endY end
  else
   currentY = currentY + step
   if currentY > endY then currentY = endY end
  end
  touch.move(1, holdX, currentY)
  sys.msleep(28)
 end

 touch.move(1, holdX, endY)
 sys.msleep(180)
 touch.up(1)
 sys.msleep(450)

 local okAfter, xAfter, yAfter = findCheckByAnyImage()
 if okAfter then
  if isCheckInGoodZone(yAfter) then
   status("Da dua khung claim video vao vung giua")
  else
   status("Da keo dung huong, se canh tiep")
  end
  return true, xAfter, yAfter
 end

 return true, x, y
end

local function swipeUpSearchOneRound()
 if checkTimeout() then return "timeout", -1, -1 end

 local x = 375
 local yStart = 1180
 local yEnd = 180
 local step = 54
 local delay = 54

 touch.down(1, x, yStart)
 sys.msleep(120)

 local y = yStart
 local tick = 0
 while y > yEnd do
  if checkTimeout() then
   touch.up(1)
   return "timeout", -1, -1
  end

  y = y - step
  touch.move(1, x, y)
  tick = tick + 1

  if tick % 4 == 0 then
   local ok, fx, fy = findCheckByAnyImage()
   if ok then
    touch.up(1)
    status("Da thay khung claim video")
    return true, fx, fy
   end
  end

  sys.msleep(delay)
 end

 touch.up(1)
 sys.msleep(120)
 return false, -1, -1
end

local function swipeDownSearchOneRound()
 if checkTimeout() then return "timeout", -1, -1 end

 local x = 375
 local yStart = 260
 local yEnd = 1220
 local step = 54
 local delay = 34

 touch.down(1, x, yStart)

local function localRecoverSwipeUp()

 touch.down(1, 375, 1020)

   touch.up(1)

local function recoverCheckNearby()
 if checkTimeout() then return "timeout", -1, -1 end

 status("Mat khung claim video, dang tim lai quanh vi tri hien tai")
 for round = 1, 4 do
  if checkTimeout() then return "timeout", -1, -1 end

  local ok, x, y = findCheckByAnyImage()

   status("Da tim lai khung claim video")

  end

  if not localRecoverSwipeUp() then
   return "timeout", -1, -1
  end
  ok, x, y = findCheckByAnyImage()

  ok, x, y = findCheckByAnyImage()

 end

 return false, -1, -1
end

local function waitAndTapClaimLoop()
 local lastTapAt = 0
 local tapCount = 0
 local lastRetryLogAt = -1
 local seenClaimAtLeastOnce = false
 local missingClaimSince = nil

 status("Khung event da o giua, cho 5s truoc khi bat dau tap ClaimVd48")
 for remain = 5, 1, -1 do
  if checkTimeout() then return false end
  status("Con " .. tostring(remain) .. "s nua se bat dau tim va tap ClaimVd48")
  sys.msleep(1000)
 end

 while true do
  if checkTimeout() then return false end

  local okCheck, _, yCheck = findCheckByAnyImage()
  if not okCheck then
   status("Dang canh ClaimVd48 nhung da mat khung event")
   return "lost"
  end

  if not isCheckInGoodZone(yCheck) then
   status("Dang canh ClaimVd48 nhung khung event da lech khoi vung giua")
   return "bad_zone"
  end

  local okClaim, claimX, claimY = findClaimButton()
  if okClaim then
   seenClaimAtLeastOnce = true
   missingClaimSince = nil
   local nowTs = os.time()
   if lastTapAt == 0 or (nowTs - lastTapAt) >= CLAIM_RETRY_SEC then
    tapCount = tapCount + 1
    status("Da thay ClaimVd48 tai " .. tostring(claimX) .. "," .. tostring(claimY) .. " | bam lan " .. tostring(tapCount))
    touch.tap(claimX + 10, claimY + 10)
    lastTapAt = nowTs
    lastRetryLogAt = nowTs
    status("Da bam ClaimVd48 lan " .. tostring(tapCount) .. ", cho 10s roi quet lai ket qua")

    sys.msleep(10000)
    if checkTimeout() then return false end

    local okCheckAfter, _, yCheckAfter = findCheckByAnyImage()
    if not okCheckAfter then
      status("Sau khi bam ClaimVd48, da mat khung event")
      return "lost"
    end
    if not isCheckInGoodZone(yCheckAfter) then
      status("Sau khi bam ClaimVd48, khung event da lech khoi vung giua")
      return "bad_zone"
    end

    local okClaimAfter = findClaimButton()
    if okClaimAfter then
      status("Sau 10s, ClaimVd48 van con -> xem nhu bam chua thanh cong, se tiep tuc chu ky tap")
    else
      status("Sau 10s, khong con thay ClaimVd48 -> tam coi la da an, nhung se canh tiep de xac nhan")
      missingClaimSince = os.time()
    end
   else
    local remain = CLAIM_RETRY_SEC - (nowTs - lastTapAt)
    if nowTs ~= lastRetryLogAt then
     status("ClaimVd48 van con, cho " .. tostring(remain) .. "s de tap lai")
     lastRetryLogAt = nowTs
    end
   end
  else
   if not seenClaimAtLeastOnce then
    status("Chua tung thay ClaimVd48.PNG, tiep tuc quet lai")
   else
    if missingClaimSince == nil then
     missingClaimSince = os.time()
     status("ClaimVd48 dang mat, bat dau canh them de xac nhan")
    elseif (os.time() - missingClaimSince) >= 10 then
     status("ClaimVd48 da mat on dinh 10s -> xem nhu hoan thanh")
     return true
    else
     status("ClaimVd48 van dang mat, cho xac nhan them " .. tostring(10 - (os.time() - missingClaimSince)) .. "s")
    end
   end
  end

  sys.msleep(1000)
 end
end

local function runSearchFlow(maxCycles)
 maxCycles = maxCycles or 30
 local lockedOnCheck = false
 local direction = "up"
 local roundsInDirection = 0
 local maxRoundsOneDirection = 12

 for cycle = 1, maxCycles do
  if checkTimeout() then
   return false
  end

  if not lockedOnCheck then
   local okCheck, xCheck, yCheck = findCheckByAnyImage()
   if okCheck then
    lockedOnCheck = true
    local adjusted = adjustCheckToBetterPosition(xCheck, yCheck)
    if not adjusted then
     lockedOnCheck = false
    else
     status("Da thay khung claim video, dung cuon")
    end
   else
    if direction == "up" then
     okCheck, xCheck, yCheck = swipeUpSearchOneRound()
    else
     okCheck, xCheck, yCheck = swipeDownSearchOneRound()
    end

    if okCheck == "timeout" then
     return false
    end

    roundsInDirection = roundsInDirection + 1

    if okCheck then
      lockedOnCheck = true
      local adjusted = adjustCheckToBetterPosition(xCheck, yCheck)
      if not adjusted then
       lockedOnCheck = false
      end
    else
      if roundsInDirection >= maxRoundsOneDirection then
       if direction == "up" then
        direction = "down"
        status("Da cuon het huong len, dao chieu tim xuong")
       else
        direction = "up"
        status("Da cuon het huong xuong, dao chieu tim len")
       end
       roundsInDirection = 0
      end
    end
   end
  end

  if lockedOnCheck then
   local result = waitAndTapClaimLoop()
   if result == true then
    return true
   elseif result == "lost" or result == "bad_zone" then
    local okRecover = recoverCheckNearby()
    if okRecover == "timeout" then
     return false
    elseif okRecover then
     local okAgain, xAgain, yAgain = findCheckByAnyImage()
     if okAgain then
      local adjusted = adjustCheckToBetterPosition(xAgain, yAgain)
      if adjusted then
       lockedOnCheck = true
      else
       lockedOnCheck = false
      end
     else
      lockedOnCheck = false
     end
    else
     lockedOnCheck = false
    end
   else
    return false
   end
  end
 end

 status("Khong hoan thanh duoc Claimvideo48")
 return false
end

while (device.is_screen_locked()) do
 device.unlock_screen()
 sys.msleep(1000)
end

if not scanTikTokBeforeRun() then
 return false
end

status("Bat dau Claimvideo48")
status("Buoc 1: tat TikTok cu")
pcall(app.quit, TIKTOK_BID)
sys.msleep(1200)
status("Buoc 2: mo lai TikTok")
app.run(TIKTOK_BID)
sys.msleep(20000)

status("Buoc 3: tim event bang mau")
if not runEventFlowForClaim() then
 return false
end

status("Buoc 4: bat dau tim khung claim video")
runSearchFlow(100)
status("Claimvideo48 da chay xong")
return true

code:
-- =========================================================
-- CUN TikTok Restore Flow AUTO via XXTouch
-- Tự quét:
--   - Data container TikTok
--   - AppGroup container TikTok
--   - Backup AppManager .adbk
--   - Phôi kích: custom name sau phần timestamp dài 2-7 ký tự
--   - Phôi gốc: custom name sau phần timestamp dài >7 ký tự
--
-- Rule name:
--   AppManager thường lưu display name dạng:
--      "May 04, 2026 17:16:47kk"
--   Suffix sau giờ 17:16:47 là "kk"
--   => suffix len=2 cũng được tính là phôi kích.
--   Ví dụ phôi kích hợp lệ:
--      "May 04, 2026 17:16:47kk"    suffix=kk len=2
--      "May 04, 2026 17:16:47kich"  suffix=kich len=4
--      "May 04, 2026 17:16:47abc"   suffix=abc len=3
--
-- Nếu không tìm ra phôi kích: DỪNG SCRIPT, không chạy tiếp.
-- =========================================================

local app = require("app")
local sys = require("sys")
local screen = require("screen")
local touch = require("touch")
local file = require("file")
local archive = require("archive")
local lfs = require("lfs")
local posix = require("posix")

local BID = "com.ss.iphone.ugc.Ame"
local GROUP_ID = "group.com.ss.iphone.ugc.Ame.TikTok.Bytemod"
local BKDIR = "/private/var/mobile/Library/ADManager"
local ROOT = "/private/var/mobile/Media/1ferver"
local LOG = ROOT .. "/log/cun_phoi_restore_flow_auto.txt"

-- Đồng xu For You thường loanh quanh vùng 61,246.
local COIN_X, COIN_Y = 61, 246
-- Dùng asset gốc extract từ TikTok campaign, đặt trong thư viện ảnh chung.
local COIN_IMG_SMALL = "/var/mobile/Media/1ferver/lua/examples/tiktok_regular_coin_small.png"
local COIN_IMG_BIG   = "/var/mobile/Media/1ferver/lua/examples/tiktok_regular_coin_big.png"
-- Vùng quét nhỏ quanh đồng xu để tránh nền video gây nhiễu.
local COIN_SEARCH_X1, COIN_SEARCH_Y1 = 15, 190
local COIN_SEARCH_X2, COIN_SEARCH_Y2 = 140, 340
-- Không tap pause nữa theo yêu cầu của anh; chỉ đợi event/đồng xu xuất hiện.

local function now() return os.date("%H:%M:%S ") end

local function log(s)
    s = tostring(s)
    local old = file.reads(LOG) or ""
    file.writes(LOG, old .. now() .. s .. "\n")
    print(s)
end

local function status(s)
    local msg = "CUN: " .. tostring(s)
    log("STATUS " .. msg)
    pcall(function() sys.toast(msg) end)
end

local function sleep(ms) sys.msleep(ms) end

local function join(a, b)
    return tostring(a):gsub("/$", "") .. "/" .. tostring(b):gsub("^/", "")
end

local function parent(p)
    return p:match("^(.+)/[^/]+/?$")
end

local function mkdirp(p)
    if not p then return end
    local cur = ""
    for part in string.gmatch(p, "[^/]+") do
        cur = cur .. "/" .. part
        pcall(lfs.mkdir, cur)
    end
end

local function list_dir(p)
    local ok, t = pcall(file.list, p)
    local out = {}
    if ok and type(t) == "table" then
        for _, n in pairs(t) do
            if n ~= "." and n ~= ".." then
                table.insert(out, tostring(n))
            end
        end
    end
    return out
end

local function exists(p) return file.exists(p) end

local function read_small(p, max_bytes)
    local f = io.open(p, "rb")
    if not f then return nil end
    local d = f:read(max_bytes or 262144)
    f:close()
    return d
end

local function contains_bytes(path, needle)
    local data = read_small(path, 524288)
    if not data then return false end
    return data:find(needle, 1, true) ~= nil
end

local function move_if_exists(src, dst)
    if exists(src) then
        mkdirp(parent(dst))
        local ok, err = os.rename(src, dst)
        log("MOVE " .. src .. " -> " .. dst .. " ok=" .. tostring(ok) .. " err=" .. tostring(err))
        return ok
    else
        log("MISS " .. src)
        return false
    end
end

local function front()
    if app.front_bid then return app.front_bid() or "" end
    return ""
end

local function is_coin_color(r, g, b)
    -- Nhận vàng/cam của đồng xu theo nhiều máy.
    -- Không dùng exact RGB vì mỗi máy/video/overlay lệch khác nhau.
    if not r or not g or not b then return false end

    local maxv = math.max(r, g, b)
    local minv = math.min(r, g, b)
    local delta = maxv - minv

    -- vàng sáng/cam: R cao, G khá cao, B thấp hơn rõ
    local yellow1 = (
        r >= 210 and g >= 145 and b <= 165 and
        r >= g - 10 and g >= b + 35 and
        delta >= 55
    )

    -- vàng nhạt/cháy sáng: gần trắng vàng, B vẫn thấp hơn G
    local yellow2 = (
        r >= 235 and g >= 190 and b >= 45 and b <= 180 and
        r >= g - 20 and g >= b + 25
    )

    -- cam đậm viền coin
    local orange = (
        r >= 190 and g >= 95 and g <= 190 and b <= 100 and
        r >= g + 25 and g >= b + 20
    )

    return yellow1 or yellow2 or orange
end

local function coin_seen_by_image()
    local imgs = {
        -- w/h là kích thước ảnh asset để tap vào tâm ảnh, không tap góc trái trên.
        {path=COIN_IMG_SMALL, name="small", sims={65, 60, 55, 50}, w=112, h=112},
        {path=COIN_IMG_BIG,   name="big",   sims={65, 60, 55, 50, 45}, w=150, h=147},
    }
    local last = ""
    for _, img in ipairs(imgs) do
        if exists(img.path) then
            for _, sim in ipairs(img.sims) do
                local ok, x, y = pcall(screen.find_image, img.path, sim, COIN_SEARCH_X1, COIN_SEARCH_Y1, COIN_SEARCH_X2, COIN_SEARCH_Y2)
                last = "try_" .. img.name .. " sim=" .. tostring(sim) .. " ok=" .. tostring(ok) .. " x=" .. tostring(x) .. " y=" .. tostring(y)
                if ok and x and y and tonumber(x) and tonumber(y) and tonumber(x) ~= -1 then
                    local tx = math.floor(tonumber(x) + img.w / 2)
                    local ty = math.floor(tonumber(y) + img.h / 2)
                    return true, "image_found name=" .. img.name .. " x=" .. tostring(x) .. " y=" .. tostring(y) .. " tap=" .. tx .. "," .. ty .. " sim=" .. tostring(sim), tx, ty
                end
            end
        else
            last = "image_missing=" .. img.path
        end
    end
    return false, last, nil, nil
end

local function coin_seen_by_color()
    -- Quét vùng rộng quanh điểm anh chỉ. Nhiều máy lệch vài chục px do UI/scale.
    -- Vùng mặc định: x 42..92, y 210..260.
    local hits = 0
    local strong_hits = 0
    local samples = 0
    local first_hit = ""
    local center_info = ""

    for dy = -25, 25, 3 do
        for dx = -20, 30, 3 do
            local x = COIN_X + dx
            local y = COIN_Y + dy
            local ok, r, g, b = pcall(screen.get_color_rgb, x, y)
            if ok then
                samples = samples + 1
                if dx == 0 and dy == 0 then center_info = string.format("center=%d,%d,%d", r, g, b) end
                if is_coin_color(r, g, b) then
                    hits = hits + 1
                    if first_hit == "" then first_hit = string.format("hit@%d,%d rgb=%d,%d,%d", x, y, r, g, b) end
                    if r >= 230 and g >= 160 and b <= 130 then
                        strong_hits = strong_hits + 1
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end

    -- Cần cụm màu, không phải 1 pixel lẻ. Nhưng nới đủ để máy khác vẫn nhận.
    if hits >= 6 or strong_hits >= 3 then
        return true, string.format("hits=%d strong=%d samples=%d %s %s", hits, strong_hits, samples, first_hit, center_info)
    end

    if center_info == "" then
        local ok, r, g, b = pcall(screen.get_color_rgb, COIN_X, COIN_Y)
        if ok then center_info = string.format("center=%d,%d,%d", r, g, b) end
    end
    return false, string.format("hits=%d strong=%d samples=%d %s", hits, strong_hits, samples, center_info)
end

local function coin_seen()
    -- Ưu tiên quét hình đồng xu bằng asset gốc TikTok; fallback màu chỉ để cứu trường hợp thiếu ảnh.
    local ok_img, info_img, tx, ty = coin_seen_by_image()
    if ok_img then return true, info_img, tx, ty end
    local ok_col, info_col = coin_seen_by_color()
    if ok_col then return true, info_img .. " | color=" .. info_col, COIN_X, COIN_Y end
    return false, info_img .. " | color=" .. info_col, nil, nil
end

local function walk_fix(p)
    if not exists(p) then return 0, 0 end
    local dirs, files = 0, 0
    local function rec(x)
        local st = lfs.attributes(x)
        local isdir = st and st.mode == "directory"
        pcall(posix.chown, x, 501, 501)
        if isdir then
            pcall(posix.chmod, x, "rwx------")
            dirs = dirs + 1
            for _, n in ipairs(list_dir(x)) do rec(join(x, n)) end
        else
            pcall(posix.chmod, x, "rw-------")
            files = files + 1
        end
    end
    rec(p)
    return dirs, files
end

-- =========================================================
-- AUTO SCAN CONTAINERS
-- =========================================================

local function find_bundle_path()
    status("Quet TikTok app bundle")
    local base = "/private/var/containers/Bundle/Application"
    local found = nil
    for _, uuid in ipairs(list_dir(base)) do
        local dir = join(base, uuid)
        for _, appname in ipairs(list_dir(dir)) do
            if appname:match("%.app$") then
                local appdir = join(dir, appname)
                local info = join(appdir, "Info.plist")
                if exists(info) and contains_bytes(info, BID) then
                    log("BUNDLE_FOUND " .. appdir)
                    found = appdir
                    break
                end
            end
        end
        if found then break end
    end
    return found
end

local function find_data_container()
    status("Quet Data container chinh xac")
    local base = "/private/var/mobile/Containers/Data/Application"
    local candidates = {}
    for _, uuid in ipairs(list_dir(base)) do
        local p = join(base, uuid)
        local meta = join(p, ".com.apple.mobile_container_manager.metadata.plist")
        local pref = join(p, "Library/Preferences/" .. BID .. ".plist")
        local has_meta = exists(meta) and contains_bytes(meta, BID)
        local has_pref = exists(pref)
        if has_meta or has_pref then
            local st = lfs.attributes(p)
            local mtime = st and tonumber(st.modification or st.change or 0) or 0
            table.insert(candidates, {path=p, has_meta=has_meta, has_pref=has_pref, mtime=mtime})
            log("DATA_CANDIDATE path=" .. p .. " meta=" .. tostring(has_meta) .. " pref=" .. tostring(has_pref) .. " mtime=" .. tostring(mtime))
        end
    end
    table.sort(candidates, function(a,b)
        local sa = (a.has_meta and 10 or 0) + (a.has_pref and 1 or 0)
        local sb = (b.has_meta and 10 or 0) + (b.has_pref and 1 or 0)
        if sa == sb then return a.mtime > b.mtime end
        return sa > sb
    end)
    if #candidates == 1 then
        log("DATA_SELECTED_SINGLE " .. candidates[1].path)
        return candidates[1].path
    end
    if #candidates > 1 then
        -- Không đoán bừa nếu có nhiều container ứng viên; log ra để tránh nạp sai thư mục.
        log("DATA_AMBIGUOUS count=" .. #candidates .. " selected=" .. candidates[1].path)
        return candidates[1].path
    end
    return nil
end

local function find_group_container()
    status("Quet AppGroup container chinh xac")
    local base = "/private/var/mobile/Containers/Shared/AppGroup"
    local candidates = {}
    for _, uuid in ipairs(list_dir(base)) do
        local p = join(base, uuid)
        local meta = join(p, ".com.apple.mobile_container_manager.metadata.plist")
        local has_meta = exists(meta) and contains_bytes(meta, GROUP_ID)
        if has_meta then
            table.insert(candidates, {path=p})
            log("GROUP_CANDIDATE path=" .. p .. " meta=true")
        end
    end
    if #candidates >= 1 then
        log("GROUP_SELECTED " .. candidates[1].path .. " count=" .. #candidates)
        return candidates[1].path
    end
    return nil
end

local function read_archive_entry(backup_path, wanted)
    local f = io.open(backup_path, "rb")
    if not f then return nil end
    local function reader(ar)
        local d = f:read(65536)
        if not d or #d == 0 then f:close(); return nil end
        return d
    end
    local r = archive.read({ reader = reader, format = "zip" })
    local out = nil
    while true do
        local e = r:next_header()
        if not e then break end
        local name = e:pathname() or ""
        if name == wanted then
            local chunks = {}
            while true do
                local ok, d = pcall(function() return r:data() end)
                if not ok or not d or #d == 0 then break end
                table.insert(chunks, d)
            end
            out = table.concat(chunks)
            break
        else
            if name:sub(-1) ~= "/" then
                while true do
                    local ok, d = pcall(function() return r:data() end)
                    if not ok or not d or #d == 0 then break end
                end
            end
        end
    end
    pcall(function() r:close() end)
    return out
end

local function archive_entry_size(backup_path, wanted)
    local f = io.open(backup_path, "rb")
    if not f then return nil end
    local function reader(ar)
        local d = f:read(65536)
        if not d or #d == 0 then f:close(); return nil end
        return d
    end
    local r = archive.read({ reader = reader, format = "zip" })
    local sz = nil
    while true do
        local e = r:next_header()
        if not e then break end
        local name = e:pathname() or ""
        if name == wanted then
            sz = tonumber(e:size() or 0) or 0
            break
        end
        if name:sub(-1) ~= "/" then
            while true do
                local ok, d = pcall(function() return r:data() end)
                if not ok or not d or #d == 0 then break end
            end
        end
    end
    pcall(function() r:close() end)
    return sz
end

local MONTHS = {Jan="01",Feb="02",Mar="03",Apr="04",May="05",Jun="06",Jul="07",Aug="08",Sep="09",Oct="10",Nov="11",Dec="12"}

local function parse_display_timestamp(display)
    display = tostring(display or "")
    local mon, day, year, hh, mm, ss = display:match("(%a%a%a)%s+(%d%d),%s+(%d%d%d%d)%s+(%d%d):(%d%d):(%d%d)")
    if not mon then return nil end
    local m = MONTHS[mon]
    if not m then return nil end
    return tostring(year)..m..tostring(day)..tostring(hh)..tostring(mm)..tostring(ss)
end

local function file_timestamp_from_name(name)
    return tostring(name or ""):match("_(%d%d%d%d%d%d%d%d%d%d%d%d%d%d)$")
end

local function parse_suffix_from_display(display)
    display = tostring(display or "")
    -- bắt suffix sau pattern HH:MM:SS, ví dụ "May 04, 2026 17:16:47kich" => kich
    local suffix = display:match("%d%d:%d%d:%d%d%s*(.+)$")
    if suffix then
        suffix = suffix:gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "")
        return suffix
    end
    return ""
end

local function build_display_map_from_backups_plist(raw)
    -- Backups.plist là binary plist nhưng custom display name thường còn ASCII.
    -- Cách cũ lấy display gần filename bị lệch record.
    -- Cách mới: quét tất cả chuỗi có timestamp, convert timestamp -> yyyyMMddHHmmss,
    -- rồi map đúng về filename có timestamp đó.
    local map = {}
    raw = tostring(raw or "")
    for s in raw:gmatch("[%w%s,:]+") do
        s = s:gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "")
        if s:find("%a%a%a%s+%d%d,%s+%d%d%d%d%s+%d%d:%d%d:%d%d") then
            local ts = parse_display_timestamp(s)
            local suffix = parse_suffix_from_display(s)
            if ts and suffix and suffix ~= "" then
                -- Nếu có nhiều string cùng timestamp, lấy string dài hơn vì thường chứa suffix đầy đủ.
                if (not map[ts]) or #s > #(map[ts] or "") then
                    map[ts] = s
                end
            end
        end
    end
    for ts, disp in pairs(map) do
        log("DISPLAY_MAP ts=" .. tostring(ts) .. " display=" .. tostring(disp) .. " suffix=" .. tostring(parse_suffix_from_display(disp)))
    end
    return map
end

local function inspect_backup(backup_name, display_map)
    local path = BKDIR .. "/" .. backup_name .. ".adbk"
    local file_ts = file_timestamp_from_name(backup_name)
    local display = (file_ts and display_map[file_ts]) or ""
    local suffix = parse_suffix_from_display(display)
    local display_ts = parse_display_timestamp(display)
    local ts_match = (display ~= "" and display_ts ~= nil and file_ts ~= nil and display_ts == file_ts)

    return {
        name = backup_name,
        path = path,
        display = display,
        suffix = suffix,
        suffix_len = #(suffix or ""),
        display_ts = display_ts,
        file_ts = file_ts,
        ts_match = ts_match
    }
end

local function find_backups()
    status("Quet backup AppManager")
    local raw = read_small(BKDIR .. "/Backups.plist", 1024 * 1024 * 4) or ""
    local display_map = build_display_map_from_backups_plist(raw)
    local arr = {}

    for _, fn in ipairs(list_dir(BKDIR)) do
        if fn:match("^" .. BID:gsub("%.", "%%.") .. "_%d+%.adbk$") then
            local name = fn:gsub("%.adbk$", "")
            local rec = inspect_backup(name, display_map)
            table.insert(arr, rec)
        end
    end

    table.sort(arr, function(a, b) return a.name > b.name end)

    local kick, goc = nil, nil
    for _, r in ipairs(arr) do
        log("BACKUP name=" .. r.name .. " display=" .. tostring(r.display) .. " suffix=" .. tostring(r.suffix) .. " suffix_len=" .. tostring(r.suffix_len) .. " file_ts=" .. tostring(r.file_ts) .. " display_ts=" .. tostring(r.display_ts) .. " ts_match=" .. tostring(r.ts_match))

        if not kick and r.suffix_len >= 2 and r.suffix_len <= 7 then
            kick = r
        end

        if not goc and r.suffix_len > 7 then
            goc = r
        end
    end

    return kick, goc, arr
end

local DATA = nil
local GROUP_PATH = nil

local function delete_tree(p)
    if not exists(p) then return true end
    local st = lfs.attributes(p)
    if st and st.mode == "directory" then
        for _, n in ipairs(list_dir(p)) do
            delete_tree(join(p, n))
        end
    end
    local ok, err = os.remove(p)
    if not ok then
        -- fallback cho XXTouch file.delete nếu os.remove không xử được
        ok, err = pcall(function() file.delete(p) end)
    end
    return ok, err
end

local function clear_current_tiktok_state(tag)
    -- Không tạo safety backup theo yêu cầu của anh.
    -- Dọn recursive thật sự, không để Library/Documents cũ làm nhiễu.
    status("Don state cu " .. tag)
    for _, n in ipairs({ "Documents", "Library", "tmp", "StoreKit", "SystemData" }) do
        local p = join(DATA, n)
        if exists(p) then
            local ok, err = delete_tree(p)
            log("DELETE_DATA_TREE " .. p .. " ok=" .. tostring(ok) .. " err=" .. tostring(err) .. " exists_after=" .. tostring(exists(p)))
        end
    end
    for _, n in ipairs({ "Library", "sec_uid_storage_file", "tracker_storage_file", "push_extension.plist" }) do
        local p = join(GROUP_PATH, n)
        if exists(p) then
            local ok, err = delete_tree(p)
            log("DELETE_GROUP_TREE " .. p .. " ok=" .. tostring(ok) .. " err=" .. tostring(err) .. " exists_after=" .. tostring(exists(p)))
        end
    end
end

local function target_for_entry(name, mode)
    if string.sub(name, 1, #BID + 1) == BID .. "/" then
        local rel = string.sub(name, #BID + 2)
        if rel == "" then return nil end
        if rel == ".com.apple.mobile_container_manager.metadata.plist" then return nil end
        return DATA .. "/" .. rel
    end

    if name == BID .. ".plist" then
        return DATA .. "/Library/Preferences/" .. BID .. ".plist"
    end

    local gp = "___groups___/" .. GROUP_ID .. "/"
    if string.sub(name, 1, #gp) == gp then
        local rel = string.sub(name, #gp + 1)
        if rel == "" then return nil end
        if rel == ".com.apple.mobile_container_manager.metadata.plist" then return nil end
        return GROUP_PATH .. "/" .. rel
    end

    -- Không nạp trực tiếp private/native sections.
    return nil
end

local function drain_entry(r)
    while true do
        local ok, d = pcall(function() return r:data() end)
        if not ok or not d or #d == 0 then return end
    end
end

local function restore_backup(rec, mode, tag)
    local backup = rec.path
    local started_at = os.time()
    status("Restore " .. tag .. " " .. rec.name)
    if tag == "phoi_kich" then
        status("Phoi kich chi nap 3 muc: appdata + plist + group")
        log("PHOI_KICH_ALLOWED_PREFIX_1 " .. BID .. "/")
        log("PHOI_KICH_ALLOWED_PREFIX_2 " .. BID .. ".plist")
        log("PHOI_KICH_ALLOWED_PREFIX_3 ___groups___/" .. GROUP_ID .. "/")
    end

    if not exists(backup) then
        status("KHONG TIM THAY " .. tag)
        log("BACKUP_NOT_FOUND tag=" .. tag .. " path=" .. backup)
        return nil
    end

    pcall(app.quit, BID)
    sleep(1500)
    clear_current_tiktok_state(tag)
    mkdirp(DATA)
    mkdirp(GROUP_PATH)

    -- Preflight: scan backup trước để biết đúng phôi này có bao nhiêu dữ liệu cần nạp.
    -- Nếu preflight đã quá ít thì dừng luôn, tránh nhảy bước giả.
    status("Kiem tra dung luong " .. tag)
    local pf = io.open(backup, "rb")
    if not pf then
        status("Mo backup preflight fail " .. tag)
        log("OPEN_PREFLIGHT_FAIL " .. backup)
        return nil
    end
    local function pf_reader(ar)
        local d = pf:read(65536)
        if not d or #d == 0 then pf:close(); return nil end
        return d
    end
    local pr = archive.read({ reader = pf_reader, format = "zip" })
    local pf_total, pf_mapped, pf_files, pf_dirs, pf_bytes = 0, 0, 0, 0, 0
    local pf_app, pf_plist, pf_group = 0, 0, 0
    while true do
        local e = pr:next_header()
        if not e then break end
        pf_total = pf_total + 1
        local name = e:pathname() or ""
        local isdir = name:sub(-1) == "/"
        local target = target_for_entry(name, mode)
        if target then
            pf_mapped = pf_mapped + 1
            if name == BID .. ".plist" then pf_plist = pf_plist + 1
            elseif string.sub(name, 1, #BID + 1) == BID .. "/" then pf_app = pf_app + 1
            elseif string.sub(name, 1, #( "___groups___/" .. GROUP_ID .. "/" )) == "___groups___/" .. GROUP_ID .. "/" then pf_group = pf_group + 1 end
            if isdir then pf_dirs = pf_dirs + 1 else pf_files = pf_files + 1; pf_bytes = pf_bytes + (tonumber(e:size() or 0) or 0) end
        end
        if not isdir then drain_entry(pr) end
    end
    pcall(function() pr:close() end)
    log("PREFLIGHT tag=" .. tag .. " total=" .. pf_total .. " mapped=" .. pf_mapped .. " files=" .. pf_files .. " dirs=" .. pf_dirs .. " bytes=" .. pf_bytes .. " app=" .. pf_app .. " plist=" .. pf_plist .. " group=" .. pf_group)
    status("Preflight " .. tag .. " files=" .. pf_files .. " MB=" .. math.floor(pf_bytes/1024/1024))
    if tag == "phoi_kich" then
        if pf_app <= 0 or pf_plist <= 0 or pf_group <= 0 or pf_files < 100 or pf_bytes < 10000000 then
            status("LOI: preflight phoi kich khong du du lieu")
            log("PREFLIGHT_KICK_FAIL app=" .. pf_app .. " plist=" .. pf_plist .. " group=" .. pf_group .. " files=" .. pf_files .. " bytes=" .. pf_bytes)
            return nil
        end
    end

    local f = io.open(backup, "rb")
    if not f then
        status("Mo backup fail " .. tag)
        log("OPEN_BACKUP_FAIL " .. backup)
        return nil
    end

    local function reader(ar)
        local d = f:read(65536)
        if not d or #d == 0 then f:close(); return nil end
        return d
    end

    local r = archive.read({ reader = reader, format = "zip" })
    local total, mapped, dirs, written, failed, mismatch, bytes = 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0
    local count_appdata, count_plist, count_group = 0, 0, 0

    while true do
        local e = r:next_header()
        if not e then break end

        total = total + 1
        local name = e:pathname() or ""
        local expected = tonumber(e:size() or 0) or 0
        local isdir = name:sub(-1) == "/"
        local target = target_for_entry(name, mode)

        if target then
            mapped = mapped + 1
            if name == BID .. ".plist" then
                count_plist = count_plist + 1
            elseif string.sub(name, 1, #BID + 1) == BID .. "/" then
                count_appdata = count_appdata + 1
            elseif string.sub(name, 1, #( "___groups___/" .. GROUP_ID .. "/" )) == "___groups___/" .. GROUP_ID .. "/" then
                count_group = count_group + 1
            end
            if isdir then
                mkdirp(target)
                dirs = dirs + 1
            else
                mkdirp(parent(target))
                local wf, err = io.open(target, "wb")
                if not wf then
                    failed = failed + 1
                    log("WRITE_OPEN_FAIL " .. target .. " err=" .. tostring(err))
                    drain_entry(r)
                else
                    local got, okall = 0, true
                    while true do
                        local ok, d = pcall(function() return r:data() end)
                        if not ok then okall = false; log("READ_ERR " .. name .. " err=" .. tostring(d)); break end
                        if not d or #d == 0 then break end
                        wf:write(d)
                        got = got + #d
                    end
                    wf:close()

                    if okall then
                        written = written + 1
                        bytes = bytes + got
                        if expected ~= got then
                            mismatch = mismatch + 1
                            log("SIZE_MISMATCH " .. name .. " expected=" .. expected .. " got=" .. got)
                        end
                    else
                        failed = failed + 1
                    end
                end
            end
        else
            if not isdir then drain_entry(r) end
        end

        if total % 200 == 0 then
            status(tag .. " progress total=" .. total .. " written=" .. written)
            log("PROGRESS tag=" .. tag .. " total=" .. total .. " mapped=" .. mapped .. " written=" .. written .. " failed=" .. failed .. " mismatch=" .. mismatch .. " bytes=" .. bytes .. " appdata=" .. count_appdata .. " plist=" .. count_plist .. " group=" .. count_group)
        end
    end

    pcall(function() r:close() end)

    local d1, f1 = walk_fix(DATA)
    local d2, f2 = walk_fix(GROUP_PATH)

    local elapsed = os.time() - started_at
    log("RESTORE_SUMMARY tag=" .. tag .. " mode=" .. mode .. " total=" .. total .. " mapped=" .. mapped .. " dirs=" .. dirs .. " written=" .. written .. " failed=" .. failed .. " mismatch=" .. mismatch .. " bytes=" .. bytes .. " appdata=" .. count_appdata .. " plist=" .. count_plist .. " group=" .. count_group .. " elapsed=" .. elapsed .. "s fix_dirs=" .. (d1 + d2) .. " fix_files=" .. (f1 + f2))
    status("Restore xong " .. tag .. " written=" .. written .. " bytes=" .. bytes .. " time=" .. elapsed .. "s")
    status("Chi tiet " .. tag .. ": app=" .. count_appdata .. " plist=" .. count_plist .. " group=" .. count_group)

    -- Chặn nhảy bước nếu thực tế chưa restore được gì.
    if mapped <= 0 or written <= 0 or bytes <= 0 then
        status("LOI: " .. tag .. " chua ghi du lieu, dung script")
        log("RESTORE_EMPTY_FAIL tag=" .. tag .. " mapped=" .. mapped .. " written=" .. written .. " bytes=" .. bytes)
        return nil
    end

    if tag == "phoi_kich" then
        if count_appdata <= 0 or count_plist <= 0 or count_group <= 0 then
            status("LOI: phoi kich thieu app/plist/group")
            log("PHOI_KICH_MISSING_SECTION appdata=" .. count_appdata .. " plist=" .. count_plist .. " group=" .. count_group)
            return nil
        end
        if written < 100 or bytes < 10000000 then
            status("LOI: phoi kich ghi qua it, dung script")
            log("PHOI_KICH_TOO_SMALL written=" .. written .. " bytes=" .. bytes)
            return nil
        end
        if bytes < math.floor(pf_bytes * 0.90) then
            status("LOI: phoi kich ghi thieu byte")
            log("PHOI_KICH_BYTES_TOO_LOW wrote=" .. bytes .. " expected=" .. pf_bytes)
            return nil
        end
        local checks = {
            {entry=BID .. "/Library/AWEStorage/UnifyStorage.sqlite", path=DATA .. "/Library/AWEStorage/UnifyStorage.sqlite", label="AWEStorage"},
            {entry=BID .. ".plist", path=DATA .. "/Library/Preferences/" .. BID .. ".plist", label="AppPlist"},
            {entry="___groups___/" .. GROUP_ID .. "/sec_uid_storage_file", path=GROUP_PATH .. "/sec_uid_storage_file", label="GroupSecUid"},
        }
        for _, c in ipairs(checks) do
            local expected_sz = archive_entry_size(backup, c.entry)
            local st = lfs.attributes(c.path)
            local actual_sz = st and tonumber(st.size or 0) or nil
            log("VERIFY_FILE " .. c.label .. " entry=" .. c.entry .. " expected=" .. tostring(expected_sz) .. " actual=" .. tostring(actual_sz) .. " path=" .. c.path)
            if not expected_sz or not actual_sz or expected_sz ~= actual_sz then
                status("LOI: verify " .. c.label .. " sai size")
                log("PHOI_KICH_VERIFY_SIZE_FAIL label=" .. c.label .. " expected=" .. tostring(expected_sz) .. " actual=" .. tostring(actual_sz))
                return nil
            end
        end
        log("PHOI_KICH_VERIFY_OK strict_size_match")
    end

    if failed > 0 then
        status("LOI: " .. tag .. " co file failed=" .. failed)
        log("RESTORE_FAILED tag=" .. tag .. " failed=" .. failed)
        return nil
    end

    return { total = total, mapped = mapped, written = written, failed = failed, mismatch = mismatch, bytes = bytes }
end

local function ocr_text_safe()
    local ok, r = pcall(screen.ocr_text)
    if not ok or type(r) ~= "table" then return "" end
    local txt = ""
    for _, v in ipairs(r) do txt = txt .. " " .. tostring(v) end
    return txt
end

local function feed_ready()
    local txt = ocr_text_safe()
    local low = txt:lower()
    local ready = (
        low:find("for you", 1, true) ~= nil or
        low:find("following", 1, true) ~= nil or
        low:find("friends", 1, true) ~= nil or
        low:find("inbox", 1, true) ~= nil or
        low:find("profile", 1, true) ~= nil or
        low:find("home", 1, true) ~= nil
    )
    return ready, txt
end

local function open_wait_coin()
    status("1/4 Dong TikTok cu")
    pcall(app.quit, BID)
    sleep(1500)

    status("2/4 Mo TikTok")
    app.run(BID)

    while front() ~= BID do
        status("Doi TikTok len man hinh")
        app.run(BID)
        sleep(3000)
    end

    status("3/4 TikTok da len man hinh, doi vao For You")

    -- Không pause sớm. Phải thấy feed/For You thật sự qua OCR, và chờ tối thiểu cho video bắt đầu chạy.
    local ready = false
    local wait_sec = 0
    while true do
        sleep(2000)
        wait_sec = wait_sec + 2
        local ok_feed, txt = feed_ready()
        local seen_coin, coin_rgb = coin_seen()
        log("WAIT_FEED sec=" .. wait_sec .. " feed=" .. tostring(ok_feed) .. " coin=" .. tostring(seen_coin) .. " coin_rgb=" .. coin_rgb .. " ocr=" .. txt:sub(1,180))

        if ok_feed and wait_sec >= 8 then
            ready = true
            break
        end

        if wait_sec % 10 == 0 then
            status("Dang doi vao For You/video... " .. wait_sec .. "s")
        end

        -- Nếu quá lâu vẫn chưa vào feed thì không pause bừa, cứ chờ tiếp theo yêu cầu không dừng ngang.
    end

    status("3/4 Da vao For You/feed, doi event")
    sleep(3000)

    status("4/4 Cho dong xu quanh 61,246")
    while true do
        local seen, rgb, tap_x, tap_y = coin_seen()
        log("COIN_CHECK seen=" .. tostring(seen) .. " rgb=" .. rgb .. " tap=" .. tostring(tap_x) .. "," .. tostring(tap_y))
        if seen then
            status("Da thay dong xu, tap vao su kien")
            if tap_x and tap_y then
                pcall(function() touch.tap(tap_x, tap_y) end)
                log("TAPPED_COIN x=" .. tostring(tap_x) .. " y=" .. tostring(tap_y))
            else
                pcall(function() touch.tap(COIN_X, COIN_Y) end)
                log("TAPPED_COIN_FALLBACK x=" .. tostring(COIN_X) .. " y=" .. tostring(COIN_Y))
            end
            sleep(5000)
            break
        end
        status("Chua thay dong xu, tiep tuc doi")
        sleep(5000)
    end

    status("Dong TikTok sau khi thay dong xu")
    pcall(app.quit, BID)
    sleep(1500)
end

}

local lines = {}

local function add(s)
  lines[#lines + 1] = tostring(s or "")
end

local function exists(p)
  local f = io.open(p, "rb")
  if f then
    local len = f:seek("end") or -1
    f:close()
    return true, len
  end
  return false, -1
end

local ok_file, file = pcall(require, "file")
local ok_lfs, lfs = pcall(require, "lfs")

local function dirname(p)
  return tostring(p):match("^(.+)/[^/]+$")
end

local function mkdirp(p)
  if not p or p == "" then return end
  local cur = ""
  for part in tostring(p):gmatch("[^/]+") do
    cur = cur .. "/" .. part
    pcall(function()
      if ok_lfs and lfs and lfs.mkdir then lfs.mkdir(cur) end
    end)
    pcall(function()
      if ok_file and file and file.mkdir then file.mkdir(cur) end
    end)
    pcall(function()
      os.execute("mkdir -p " .. "'" .. cur:gsub("'", "'\\''") .. "'")
    end)
  end
end

local function list(p)
  if ok_file and file and file.list then
    local ok, t = pcall(file.list, p)
    if ok and type(t) == "table" then
      return t
    end
  end
  return {}
end

local function shell_quote(s)
  return "'" .. tostring(s):gsub("'", "'\\''") .. "'"
end

local function sh(cmd)
  add("$ " .. cmd)
  local f = io.popen(cmd .. " 2>&1")
  local o = ""
  if f then
    o = f:read("*a") or ""
    local ok, why, code = f:close()
    o = o .. "\nCLOSE " .. tostring(ok) .. " " .. tostring(why) .. " " .. tostring(code)
  else
    o = "io.popen failed"
  end
  add(o)
  return o
end

local function download_with_lua_socket(url, dst)
  local ok_http, http = pcall(require, "socket.http")
  local ok_ltn12, ltn12 = pcall(require, "ltn12")

  if not ok_http or not http or not ok_ltn12 or not ltn12 then
    add("Lua socket.http/ltn12 missing")
    return false
  end

  local f, err = io.open(dst, "wb")
  if not f then
    add("Lua download open dst fail: " .. tostring(err))
    return false
  end

  local ok, code, headers, status = http.request({
    url = url,
    sink = ltn12.sink.file(f),
    redirect = true,
  })

  add("Lua http.request ok=" .. tostring(ok) .. " code=" .. tostring(code) .. " status=" .. tostring(status))

  local ex, len = exists(dst)
  return ex and len and len > 1024 * 1024
end

local function download_ipa()
  mkdirp(dirname(IPA))

  local ok, len = exists(IPA)
  if ok and len > 1024 * 1024 then
    add("IPA already exists len=" .. tostring(len))
    return true
  end

  -- Dọn file lỗi/HTML cũ nếu có
  pcall(os.remove, IPA)
  pcall(function()
    if ok_file and file and file.delete then file.delete(IPA) end
  end)

  -- Thử curl/wget nếu máy có binary
  sh("/usr/bin/curl -L --fail --connect-timeout 20 --max-time 300 -o " .. shell_quote(IPA) .. " " .. shell_quote(IPA_URL))
  ok, len = exists(IPA)
  if ok and len > 1024 * 1024 then return true end

  sh("/var/jb/usr/bin/curl -L --fail --connect-timeout 20 --max-time 300 -o " .. shell_quote(IPA) .. " " .. shell_quote(IPA_URL))
  ok, len = exists(IPA)
  if ok and len > 1024 * 1024 then return true end

  sh("/usr/bin/wget -O " .. shell_quote(IPA) .. " " .. shell_quote(IPA_URL))
  ok, len = exists(IPA)
  if ok and len > 1024 * 1024 then return true end

  sh("/var/jb/usr/bin/wget -O " .. shell_quote(IPA) .. " " .. shell_quote(IPA_URL))
  ok, len = exists(IPA)
  if ok and len > 1024 * 1024 then return true end

  -- Fallback Lua socket
  if download_with_lua_socket(IPA_URL, IPA) then return true end

  ok, len = exists(IPA)
  add("DOWNLOAD_FAIL exists=" .. tostring(ok) .. " len=" .. tostring(len))
  return false
end

local function find_trollstore()
for _, root in ipairs(roots) do
    for _, uuid in ipairs(list(root)) do
      local dir = root .. "/" .. tostring(uuid)
      for _, name in ipairs(list(dir)) do
        local appname = tostring(name)
        local apppath = dir .. "/" .. appname

        if appname == "TrollStore.app" then
          local helper = apppath .. "/trollstorehelper"
          local ok = exists(helper)
          if ok then
            return apppath, helper
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
  return nil, nil
end

local function find_shadowrocket()
  local found = nil
  local count = 0

  for _, root in ipairs(roots) do
    for _, uuid in ipairs(list(root)) do
      local dir = root .. "/" .. tostring(uuid)
      for _, name in ipairs(list(dir)) do
        local appname = tostring(name)
        if appname == "Shadowrocket.app" then
          count = count + 1
          found = dir .. "/" .. appname
          add("FOUND Shadowrocket " .. found)
        end
      end
    end
  end

  return found, count
end

      add("app.open com.liguangming.Shadowrocket ok=" .. tostring(ok) .. " err=" .. tostring(err))

-- OpenClaw/PYW status sync: write readable status for GUI polling even when run directly on client.
local OC_STATUS_PATH = rawget(_G, "OC_STATUS_PATH") or "/var/mobile/Media/1ferver/lua/examples/oc_status.txt"
function oc_status(text)
    text = tostring(text or "")
    if type(__oc_write_status) == "function" then pcall(__oc_write_status, text) end
    pcall(function()
        local line = tostring(os.time()) .. "|" .. text
        local wrote = false
        local ok_file, file = pcall(require, "file")
        if ok_file and file then
            if type(file.writes) == "function" then local ok = pcall(file.writes, OC_STATUS_PATH, line); wrote = ok or wrote end
            if (not wrote) and type(file.write) == "function" then local ok = pcall(file.write, OC_STATUS_PATH, line); wrote = ok or wrote end
        end
        if not wrote then
            local f = io.open(OC_STATUS_PATH, "w")
            if f then f:write(line) f:close() end
        end
    end)
end
function oc_toast(text, ...)
    text = tostring(text or "")
    oc_status(text)
    if sys and type(sys.toast) == "function" then return sys.toast(text, ...) end
end

local function countdown_wait(ms, label)

 local lastShown = -1
 while remain > 0 do
  local sec = math.ceil(remain / 1000)
  if sec ~= lastShown then
   status(label .. " " .. sec .. "s")
   lastShown = sec
  end
  local step = remain < 1000 and remain or 1000
  sys.msleep(step)
  remain = remain - step
 end

    return "cooldown_done", tapX, tapY, finalReady
   end
   tapVisibleLastLoop = true
  else
   tapVisibleLastLoop = false
  end

  if lostCount >= lostNeed then
   local okRecover = recoverCheckNearby()
   if okRecover == "timeout" then
    return "timeout", -1, -1, finalReady
   elseif okRecover then
    lostCount = 0
   else
    status("Khong tim lai duoc Event 20p quanh vi tri hien tai")
    return "lost", -1, -1, finalReady
   end
  end

  sys.msleep(250)
 end

 status("Het thoi gian cho bam Event 20p")
 return "timeout_wait", -1, -1, finalReady
end

local function runSearchFlow(maxCycles)
 maxCycles = maxCycles or 30
 local lockedOnCheck = false
 local direction = "up"
 local roundsInDirection = 0
 local maxRoundsOneDirection = 12
 local finalReady = false

 for cycle = 1, maxCycles do
  if checkTimeout() then
   return false
  end

  if not lockedOnCheck then
   local okCheck, xCheck, yCheck = findCheck()
   if okCheck then
    lockedOnCheck = true
    adjustCheckToBetterPosition(xCheck, yCheck)
    status("Da thay Event 20p, dung cuon")
   else
    if direction == "up" then
     okCheck, xCheck, yCheck = swipeUpSearchOneRound()
    else
     okCheck, xCheck, yCheck = swipeDownSearchOneRound()
    end

    if okCheck == "timeout" then
     if checkTimeout() then
      return false
     end
     okCheck = false
     xCheck = -1
     yCheck = -1
    end

    roundsInDirection = roundsInDirection + 1

    if okCheck then
     lockedOnCheck = true
     adjustCheckToBetterPosition(xCheck, yCheck)
    else
     if roundsInDirection >= maxRoundsOneDirection then
        if direction == "up" then
       direction = "down"
       status("Da cuon het huong len, dao chieu tim xuong")
      else
       direction = "up"
       status("Da cuon het huong xuong, dao chieu tim len")
      end
      roundsInDirection = 0
     end
    end
   end
  end

  if lockedOnCheck then
   local result, _, _, finalState = waitTapAfterCheck(8, finalReady)
   finalReady = finalState

   if result == "cooldown_done" then
    lockedOnCheck = false
    finalReady = false
   elseif result == "lost" then
    lockedOnCheck = false
    status("Mat Event 20p, tiep tuc tim lai tu vi tri hien tai")
   elseif result == "timeout_wait" then
    status("Het thoi gian cho bam, tiep tuc tim quanh day")
    local okRecover = recoverCheckNearby()
    if okRecover == "timeout" then
     if checkTimeout() then
      return false
     end
     lockedOnCheck = false
    elseif okRecover then
     lockedOnCheck = true
    else
     lockedOnCheck = false
    end
   elseif result == "timeout" then
    if checkTimeout() then
     return false
    end
    lockedOnCheck = false
   end
  end
 end

 status("Khong hoan thanh duoc")
 return false
end

runSearchFlow(100)

-- Install LidCopy local IPA with TrollStore, then open and verify copy result.
-- Required files on device:
--   /var/mobile/Media/1ferver/ipa/LidCopy.ipa              -- real IPA, ZIP header PK
--   /var/mobile/Media/1ferver/ipa/Cookies.binarycookies    -- source file used by LidCopy v5.0

local IPA = "/var/mobile/Media/1ferver/ipa/LidCopy.ipa"
local SRC = "/var/mobile/Media/1ferver/ipa/Cookies.binarycookies"
local BUNDLE_ID = "com.local.lidcopy"
local OUT = "/var/mobile/Media/lua/examples/install_lidcopy_local_trollstore.txt"

local roots = {
 "/var/containers/Bundle/Application",
 "/private/var/containers/Bundle/Application",
}

local lines = {}
local install_ok = false
local opened = false

local function add(s)
 lines[#lines + 1] = tostring(s or "")
end

local function exists(p)
 local f = io.open(p, "rb")
 if f then
  local len = f:seek("end") or -1
  f:close()
  return true, len
 end
 return false, -1
end

local function read_file(p, n)
 local f = io.open(p, "rb")
 if not f then return nil end
 local data = f:read(n or "*a") or ""
 f:close()
 return data
end

local ok_file, file = pcall(require, "file")
local ok_lfs, lfs = pcall(require, "lfs")

local function dirname(p)
 return tostring(p):match("^(.+)/[^/]+$")
end

local function mkdirp(p)
 if not p or p == "" then return end
 local cur = ""
 for part in tostring(p):gmatch("[^/]+") do
  cur = cur .. "/" .. part
  pcall(function()
   if ok_lfs and lfs and lfs.mkdir then lfs.mkdir(cur) end
  end)
  pcall(function()
   if ok_file and file and file.mkdir then file.mkdir(cur) end
  end)
 end
end

local function list(p)
 if ok_file and file and file.list then
  local ok, t = pcall(file.list, p)
  if ok and type(t) == "table" then return t end
 end
 return {}
end

local function shell_quote(s)
 return "'" .. tostring(s):gsub("'", "'\\''") .. "'"
end

local function sh(cmd)
 add("$ " .. cmd)
 local f = io.popen(cmd .. " 2>&1")
 local o = ""
 local ok, why, code = nil, nil, nil
 if f then
  o = f:read("*a") or ""
  ok, why, code = f:close()
  o = o .. "\nCLOSE " .. tostring(ok) .. " " .. tostring(why) .. " " .. tostring(code)
 end
 add(o)
 return o, ok, why, code
end

local function find_trollstore_helper()
 for _, root in ipairs(roots) do
  for _, uuid in ipairs(list(root)) do
   local dir = root .. "/" .. tostring(uuid)
   for _, name in ipairs(list(dir)) do
    local appname = tostring(name)
    if appname == "TrollStore.app" then
     local helper = dir .. "/TrollStore.app/trollstorehelper"
     local ok = exists(helper)
     if ok then return dir .. "/TrollStore.app", helper end
    end
   end
  end
 end
 return nil, nil
end

local function plist_has_bundle_id(appdir)
 local data = read_file(appdir .. "/Info.plist")
 if not data then return false, false end
 local has_bid = data:find(BUNDLE_ID, 1, true) ~= nil
 local is_v5_or_newer = has_bid and (data:find("5.", 1, true) ~= nil)
 return has_bid, is_v5_or_newer
end

local function find_lidcopy()
 local found = nil
 local count = 0
 local has_v5 = false
 for _, root in ipairs(roots) do
  for _, uuid in ipairs(list(root)) do
   local dir = root .. "/" .. tostring(uuid)
   for _, name in ipairs(list(dir)) do
    local appname = tostring(name)
    if appname:match("%.app$") then
     local appdir = dir .. "/" .. appname
     local has_bid, is_v5 = plist_has_bundle_id(appdir)
     if appname == "LidCopy.app" or has_bid then
      count = count + 1
      found = appdir
      has_v5 = has_v5 or is_v5
      add("FOUND " .. found)
      add("INFO_HAS_5_OR_NEWER=" .. tostring(is_v5))
     end
    end
   end
  end
 end
 return found, count, has_v5
end

local function save_log()
 local text = table.concat(lines, "\n\n")
 mkdirp(dirname(OUT))
 local f = io.open(OUT, "w")
 if f then
  f:write(text)
  f:close()
 end
 print(text)
end

local function first4_text(p)
 local h = read_file(p, 4)
 if not h then return "nil" end
 local b1 = string.byte(h, 1) or -1
 local b2 = string.byte(h, 2) or -1
 local b3 = string.byte(h, 3) or -1
 local b4 = string.byte(h, 4) or -1
 return tostring(b1) .. "," .. tostring(b2) .. "," .. tostring(b3) .. "," .. tostring(b4)
end

local function is_zip_ipa(p)
 local h = read_file(p, 4)
 if not h then return false end
 return (string.byte(h, 1) or -1) == 80 and (string.byte(h, 2) or -1) == 75
end

local function verify_copy()
 local ok_app, app = pcall(require, "app")
 if not ok_app or not app or not app.data_path then
  add("VERIFY: require app/app.data_path failed")
  return false
 end
 local safari = app.data_path("com.apple.mobilesafari")
 add("SAFARI=" .. tostring(safari))
 if not safari or safari == "" then return false end
 local dst = safari .. "/Library/Cookies/Cookies.binarycookies"
 local bak = safari .. "/Library/Cookies/Cookies.binarycookies_backup"
 local src_ok, src_len = exists(SRC)
 local dst_ok, dst_len = exists(dst)
 local bak_ok, bak_len = exists(bak)
 add("SRC exists=" .. tostring(src_ok) .. " len=" .. tostring(src_len) .. " first4=" .. first4_text(SRC))
 add("DST exists=" .. tostring(dst_ok) .. " len=" .. tostring(dst_len) .. " first4=" .. first4_text(dst))
 add("BAK exists=" .. tostring(bak_ok) .. " len=" .. tostring(bak_len) .. " first4=" .. first4_text(bak))
 return src_ok and dst_ok and src_len == dst_len and src_len > 0
end

add("=== LidCopy v5 local install start ===")
add("IPA=" .. IPA)
add("SRC=" .. SRC)

local ipa_ok, ipa_len = exists(IPA)
add("IPA exists=" .. tostring(ipa_ok) .. " len=" .. tostring(ipa_len) .. " first4=" .. first4_text(IPA))
add("IPA_IS_ZIP=" .. tostring(is_zip_ipa(IPA)))

local src_ok, src_len = exists(SRC)
add("SRC exists=" .. tostring(src_ok) .. " len=" .. tostring(src_len) .. " first4=" .. first4_text(SRC))

local ts, helper = find_trollstore_helper()
add("TROLLSTORE=" .. tostring(ts))
add("HELPER=" .. tostring(helper))

if not ipa_ok or ipa_len <= 50 * 1024 then
 add("ERROR: IPA missing/too small")
elseif not is_zip_ipa(IPA) then
 add("ERROR: IPA invalid header. Expected PK/80,75. Replace LidCopy.ipa with real IPA.")
elseif not src_ok or src_len <= 0 then
 add("ERROR: source Cookies.binarycookies missing/empty")
elseif not helper then
 add("ERROR: TrollStore helper missing")
else
 local out = sh(helper .. " install " .. shell_quote(IPA))
 install_ok = (out and out:find("returning 0", 1, true) ~= nil)
 add("INSTALL_OK=" .. tostring(install_ok))
 sh(helper .. " refresh")
end

local app_path, count, has_v5 = find_lidcopy()
add("COUNT=" .. tostring(count))
add("APP_PATH=" .. tostring(app_path))
add("HAS_V5_OR_NEWER=" .. tostring(has_v5))

local ok_app, app = pcall(require, "app")
if ok_app and app and app.run then
 local ok, res = pcall(app.run, BUNDLE_ID)
 add("app.run " .. BUNDLE_ID .. " pcall=" .. tostring(ok) .. " res=" .. tostring(res))
 opened = ok and (res == 0 or res == true)
else
 add("ERROR: require app/app.run failed")
end
add("OPENED=" .. tostring(opened))

-- wait a moment for LidCopy to perform the copy, then verify destination.
pcall(function()
 local sys = require("sys")
 if sys and sys.msleep then sys.msleep(1500) end
end)

local copied_ok = verify_copy()
add("COPIED_OK=" .. tostring(copied_ok))

save_log()

-- Silent mode: no sys.toast/sys.alert. Check OUT log for result.
return true

        if name ~= "." and name ~= ".." then

            local ok1 = pcall(function()
                if type(file.remove) == "function" then

            local ok2 = pcall(function()
                os.remove(path)
            end)

            print("DELETE_COOKIE_FILE=" .. name .. " file.remove=" .. tostring(ok1) .. " os.remove=" .. tostring(ok2))
            count = count + 1
        end
    end

title: Clear LOG EarnAPP
code:
local file = require("file")

local BIDS = {
  "com.brd.earnapp",
}

local bases = {
  "/private/var/mobile/Containers/Data/Application",
  "/var/mobile/Containers/Data/Application",
}

local function join(a,b)
  return tostring(a):gsub("/$","") .. "/" .. tostring(b):gsub("^/","")
end

local function is_dir(p)
  return type(file.list(p)) == "table"
end

local function exists(p)
  return file.exists(p) or is_dir(p)
end

local function list(p)
  local t = file.list(p)
  local r = {}
  if type(t) == "table" then
    for _,v in pairs(t) do
      v = tostring(v)
      if v ~= "." and v ~= ".." then table.insert(r, v) end
    end
  end
  table.sort(r)
  return r
end

local function find_container_by_bid(bid)
  for _,base in ipairs(bases) do
    for _,uuid in ipairs(list(base)) do
      local c = join(base, uuid)
      if is_dir(c) then
        local plist = join(c, "Library/Preferences/" .. bid .. ".plist")
        local brdsdk = join(c, "Library/Application Support/brdsdk")
        if exists(plist) or is_dir(brdsdk) then
          return c
        end
      end
    end
  end
  return nil
end

local function rm_tree(p)
  if is_dir(p) then
    for _,name in ipairs(list(p)) do
      rm_tree(join(p, name))
    end
    os.remove(p)
  else
    os.remove(p)
  end
end

local found = nil
for _,bid in ipairs(BIDS) do
  found = find_container_by_bid(bid)
  if found then break end
end

if not found then
  toast("Không tìm thấy Earnapp data")
  print("NO_EARNAPP_CONTAINER")
  return false
end

local brdsdk = join(found, "Library/Application Support/brdsdk")
if not is_dir(brdsdk) then
  toast("Không có brdsdk")
  print("NO_BRDSDK: " .. brdsdk)
  return false
end

local deleted = 0
local kept_db = false

for _,name in ipairs(list(brdsdk)) do
  if name == "db" then
    kept_db = true
  else
    rm_tree(join(brdsdk, name))
    deleted = deleted + 1
  end
end

toast("Đã xoá brdsdk log: " .. deleted .. " | giữ db=" .. tostring(kept_db))
print("CONTAINER=" .. found)
print("BRDSDK=" .. brdsdk)
print("DELETED=" .. tostring(deleted))
print("DB_EXISTS=" .. tostring(is_dir(join(brdsdk, "db"))))

return true

title: Cấu Hình Shadow
code:
local file = require("file")
local sqlite3 = require("lsqlite3")
local app_ok, app = pcall(require, "app")
local sys_ok, sys = pcall(require, "sys")

local OUT = "/var/mobile/Media/shadowrocket_fix_pipo_rules_log.txt"
local DOMAINS = { "pipopay.com", "mitm.it" }
local FINAL_POLICY = "DIRECT"
local ROOTS = {
  "/private/var/mobile/Containers/Data/Application",
  "/var/mobile/Containers/Data/Application",
}
local lines = {}

local function add(s) lines[#lines + 1] = tostring(s or "") end
local function join(a, b) return tostring(a):gsub("/$", "") .. "/" .. tostring(b):gsub("^/", "") end

local function list(p)
  local ok, t = pcall(file.list, p)
  local r = {}
  if ok and type(t) == "table" then
    for _, v in pairs(t) do
      v = tostring(v)
      if v ~= "." and v ~= ".." then table.insert(r, v) end
    end
  end
  table.sort(r)
  return r
end

local function exists(p)
  local f = io.open(p, "rb")
  if f then
    local n = f:seek("end") or -1
    f:close()
    return true, n
  end
  return false, -1
end

local function read_all(p)
  local f = io.open(p, "rb")
  if not f then return nil end
  local s = f:read("*a") or ""
  f:close()
  return s
end

local function write_all(p, s)
  local f = io.open(p, "wb")
  if not f then return false end
  f:write(s or "")
  f:close()
  return true
end

local function find_shadow_db()
  for _, root in ipairs(ROOTS) do
    for _, uuid in ipairs(list(root)) do
      local c = join(root, uuid)
      local plist = join(c, "Library/Preferences/com.liguangming.Shadowrocket.plist")
      local db = join(c, "Documents/Databases/default.db")
      local ok_plist = exists(plist)
      local ok_db, db_len = exists(db)
      if ok_plist and ok_db and db_len > 0 then
        return c, db
      end
    end
  end
  return nil, nil
end

local container, db_path = find_shadow_db()
add("CONTAINER=" .. tostring(container))
add("DB=" .. tostring(db_path))

if not db_path then
  add("ERROR: Shadowrocket default.db not found")
else
  local bak = db_path .. ".bak_" .. tostring(os.time())
  local raw = read_all(db_path)
  if raw then
    write_all(bak, raw)
    add("BACKUP=" .. bak .. " len=" .. tostring(#raw))
  else
    add("WARN: backup read failed")
  end

  local db = sqlite3.open(db_path)
  if not db then
    add("ERROR: sqlite open failed")
  else
    pcall(function() db:exec("BEGIN IMMEDIATE") end)

    for _, domain in ipairs(DOMAINS) do
      local found = false
      local old = ""
      local q = "SELECT docid, c3option FROM config_content WHERE c0section='rule' AND c1name='DOMAIN-SUFFIX' AND c2value=" .. string.format("%q", domain) .. " LIMIT 20"
      for row in db:nrows(q) do
        found = true
        old = old .. " docid=" .. tostring(row.docid) .. " option=" .. tostring(row.c3option)
        db:exec("UPDATE config_content SET c3option='PROXY' WHERE docid=" .. tostring(row.docid))
      end

      if found then
        add("UPDATE " .. domain .. old .. " -> PROXY")
      else
        local sql = "INSERT INTO config_content(c0section,c1name,c2value,c3option,c4ext,c5remarks,c6created) VALUES('rule','DOMAIN-SUFFIX'," .. string.format("%q", domain) .. ",'PROXY','',''," .. tostring(os.time()) .. ")"
        local rc = db:exec(sql)
        add("INSERT " .. domain .. " rc=" .. tostring(rc))
      end
    end

    local final_found = false
    for row in db:nrows("SELECT docid, c3option FROM config_content WHERE c0section='rule' AND c1name='FINAL' LIMIT 20") do
      final_found = true
      add("UPDATE FINAL docid=" .. tostring(row.docid) .. " option=" .. tostring(row.c3option) .. " -> " .. FINAL_POLICY)
      db:exec("UPDATE config_content SET c3option=" .. string.format("%q", FINAL_POLICY) .. " WHERE docid=" .. tostring(row.docid))
    end
    if not final_found then
      local sql = "INSERT INTO config_content(c0section,c1name,c2value,c3option,c4ext,c5remarks,c6created) VALUES('rule','FINAL',''," .. string.format("%q", FINAL_POLICY) .. ",'',''," .. tostring(os.time()) .. ")"
      local rc = db:exec(sql)
      add("INSERT FINAL " .. FINAL_POLICY .. " rc=" .. tostring(rc))
    end

    pcall(function() db:exec("COMMIT") end)
    pcall(function() db:exec("VACUUM") end)
    db:close()

    local db2 = sqlite3.open(db_path)
    if db2 then
      for _, domain in ipairs(DOMAINS) do
        local q = "SELECT docid, c1name, c2value, c3option FROM config_content WHERE c0section='rule' AND c1name='DOMAIN-SUFFIX' AND c2value=" .. string.format("%q", domain)
        for row in db2:nrows(q) do
          add("VERIFY " .. tostring(row.docid) .. " " .. tostring(row.c1name) .. " " .. tostring(row.c2value) .. " " .. tostring(row.c3option))
        end
      end
      for row in db2:nrows("SELECT docid, c1name, c2value, c3option FROM config_content WHERE c0section='rule' AND c1name='FINAL'") do
        add("VERIFY " .. tostring(row.docid) .. " " .. tostring(row.c1name) .. " " .. tostring(row.c2value) .. " " .. tostring(row.c3option))
      end
      db2:close()
    end

    if app_ok and app then
      pcall(app.quit, "com.liguangming.Shadowrocket")
      if sys_ok and sys and sys.msleep then sys.msleep(1000) end
      pcall(app.run, "com.liguangming.Shadowrocket")
    end
  end
end

local text = table.concat(lines, "\n")
local f = io.open(OUT, "w")
if f then f:write(text); f:close() end
print(text)
if sys_ok and sys and sys.toast then sys.toast("Shadow rule fix xong") end
return db_path ~= nil
